name: huawei-terminology
description: Search the Huawei terminology database (3ms.huawei.com/terminology) — returns English term, Chinese term, domain, confidence, and definition. Requires a logged-in Huawei session via the OpenCLI Browser Bridge.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search the Huawei terminology database (3ms.huawei.com/terminology). Returns English term, Chinese term, domain, confidence, and definition. Requires a logged-in Huawei session via the OpenCLI Browser Bridge.

args.name: language
args.help: Source language to search: en | cn

args.name: filter-language
args.help: Restrict to a result language, e.g. cn. Empty = all.
